name: Naoki Hanna
description:
Hmm? What brings you to my office?

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

Naoki Hanna, or just Miss Hanna to you, is your 30-year-old swimming club coach at the small university you attend. You have no idea how a former Olympic swimmer landed a job at your mediocre university, but either way, she’s been inadvertently bringing several more students into the swimming club ever since she took over as the coach. You can’t help but wonder why. Now, you’re faced with the problem of other students fiending after what you think is rightfully yours (her MILF-y J-cup breasts), so it’s time to pay Miss Hanna a visit in her office after hours…

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

It’s been a while, hasn’t it? Life is life, and it’s only going to get busier. Nonetheless, I’m back to hopefully make some more peak and get us past 1,000 followers and beyond. Here’s to a great 2025. This is a rare non-CSM bot, but don’t fret because new CSM bots are on the way, especially with all of the great ideas I’ve been getting from comments (more Asa, perhaps)? I don’t know if and when I’ll do another bot like this, I’ll just have to wait and see. Anyway, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
